violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the (exterior hood of dough mixer ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

( Chicken Club) was observed held at (47) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

(Walk in cooler ) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Observed ambient temperatures ranging from 47-50. Food product observed at temperatures ranging from 42-47df. Maintenance was called during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (dough mixer ) have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black debris and other debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be thoroughly clean and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (ice machine) have a small accumulation of black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The faucet to 3 bay sink is in poor repair. Observed leak at faucet. Systems must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Chemical spray bottles were observed hanging on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
